name: Classical Web (HTTP/JSON)
strengths: Universal tooling. Every device speaks it. Caching at the CDN works for static content. Loose coupling — clients and servers evolve independently.
tradeoffs: Most bytes are restating things both sides already know — headers, cookies, framework boilerplate, repeated JSON keys. Server is a single point of failure. CDN cache helps GET but not authenticated reads. Polling is wasteful; long-poll and SSE are bolted on.
real_world_examples: Every REST API. Every news site. Most SaaS. Slack, Twitter web, GitHub web.
